[prelaunch] Root UI wrapper help
usage: hanna tui [-h] [--target TARGET] [--modules MODULES]
                 [--run-mode {idle,manual,aggregate,chain}] [--module MODULE]
                 [--phones PHONES] [--usernames USERNAMES] [--workers WORKERS]
                 [--db DB] [--exports-dir EXPORTS_DIR] [--output OUTPUT]
                 [--verify] [--verify-all] [--verify-content] [--proxy PROXY]
                 [--leak-dir LEAK_DIR] [--no-preflight]
                 [--export-formats EXPORT_FORMATS] [--export-dir EXPORT_DIR]
                 [--report-mode {internal,shareable,strict}] [--plain]

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --target TARGET       Optional target label to preload into the cockpit
  --modules MODULES     Comma-separated modules or preset name for cockpit
                        context
  --run-mode {idle,manual,aggregate,chain}
  --module MODULE       Manual-mode adapter name
  --phones PHONES       Comma-separated known phones
  --usernames USERNAMES
                        Comma-separated known usernames
  --workers WORKERS
  --db DB
  --exports-dir EXPORTS_DIR
  --output OUTPUT       Optional HTML dossier path for chain mode
  --verify
  --verify-all
  --verify-content
  --proxy PROXY
  --leak-dir LEAK_DIR
  --no-preflight
  --export-formats EXPORT_FORMATS
                        Comma-separated export formats: json,metadata,stix,zip
  --export-dir EXPORT_DIR
                        Directory for machine-readable exports
  --report-mode {internal,shareable,strict}
  --plain               Reserve a plain-mode flag for low-capability terminals
